positive: A highly stylized, celestial flora composition featuring bioluminescent deep-sea anglerfish merged with exotic tropical jungle leaves. The main subject is a central, symmetrical arrangement of glowing, iridescent petals and crystalline foliage that seem to float in deep space. Use extreme contrast, emphasizing electric blues, neon purples, and glowing cyan highlights against a pitch-black, velvety background. Clean silhouettes, Art Nouveau aesthetic mixed with cyberpunk glow, detailed cross-section view, vector illustration quality, designed for screen printing, central composition, perfect for t-shirt print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, low resolution, grainy, signature, copyright, blurry edges, disfigured
